title: AstralLevelTweak
description: Allows you to edit the formula for Astral Sorcery perk level experience
body:
Allows you to edit the formula for Astral Sorcery perk level experience.
 

The formula can be written using everything listed [here](http://javaluator.fathzer.com/en/doc/javadoc/com/fathzer/soft/javaluator/DoubleEvaluator.html), and two additional variables `i` and `prev`. `i` is the current level number, and `prev` is the previous levels xp or 0.
 

Made for [Multiblock Madness](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/multiblock-madness)
